area.value: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: You fill creatures with feelings of seething envy. Affected targets turn upon the nearest creature (whether an ally or enemy) and attempt to disarm it of a valuable weapon, steal something it is holding, or grapple it and strip it of something it prizes (your choice). Affected targets can attempt a new Will save each round as a free action to end this effect. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
